creator: dev2@heesakkers.info
text:
Even though I have yet to upgrade my build-box to 11-CURRENT, zbar does build for me in a 11-CURRENT jail:
http://heesakkers.info/poudriere/2015-11-02_00h18m34s/logs/zbar-0.10_10.log

You appear to be building using openmp, but openmp is neither required nor requested for graphics/zbar.

The configure stage appears to be missing from your log, can you add it?
